'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 107''' is the one hundred seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 14]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] Campaign
*The survival of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*The [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]
*Short Range Transport
*[[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] Hangar
*[[Yinchorri starfighter]]
